one_time_description: Investment loss on 51% share of Digby Pines Golf Resort and Spa Limited Partnership (modified equity method, partnership loss for period Nov 28, 2019 to Mar 31, 2020)
economic_notes: Bear River First Nation operates L'sitkuk Gas Bar Limited and has a 51% interest in 3331821 Nova Scotia Limited Partnership operating Digby Pines Golf Resort and Spa. Fisheries operations include lobster and tuna licenses. First Nation received COVID-19 response funding from ISC.
notes: Fiscal year is 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Five consolidated entities: Bear River First Nation Housing Projects, Bear River First Nation Health Center, L'sitkuk Gas Bar Limited, 3331786 Nova Scotia Limited, 3331787 Nova Scotia Limited. One GBE: 51% interest in Digby Pines Golf Resort and Spa (3331821 Nova Scotia Limited Partnership) accounted for on modified equity basis. Investment loss of $165,837 recorded. Large Peace Hills Trust loan of $1,623,325 taken out in 2020. Budget was approved May 9, 2017 (noted as unusual). Non-compliance noted: First Nation does not apply rent-to-income scale for Section 95 housing units. restricted_cash of $153,919 represents CMHC and MCARR reserves held in separate accounts. Net debt position of $1,028,435. Annual debt service reflects only repayment of long-term debt per cash flow statement.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
